claim: The map F below has det(JF) identically -2 (nonzero constant) and is not injective: the three listed points are distinct and share the image (-1/4, 0, 0). Jointly this contradicts the conjecture.
provenance: External construction by Levent Alpoge (Anthropic), presented 2026-07-19 with the help of Claude Fable; Wikipedia lists it as a counterexample 'awaiting confirmation' (widely verified, not yet peer-reviewed). This repo's contribution is the independent replayable verification only.
